keyPointsSummary: Reported speech backshifts tense; question tags use opposite polarity
Comparatives/superlatives change form based on adjective length
Articles depend on specificity and sound; conditionals depend on real vs unreal situations
'Since' + starting point, 'for' + duration; 'wish/if only' express regret

quickQuiz.hindi: उसने कहा कि वह थका हुआ था।
quickQuiz.answer: He said that he was tired.

quickQuiz.hindi: उसने पूछा कि मैं कहाँ रहता था।
तुम आ रहे हो, है ना?

quickQuiz.answer: This is the most interesting book.
The sun rises in the east.

quickQuiz.hindi: अगर तुम मेहनत करोगे, तो सफल होगे।
quickQuiz.answer: If you work hard, you will succeed.

quickQuiz.hindi: अगर मेरे पास पैसे होते, तो मैं यह घर खरीदता।
quickQuiz.answer: If I had money, I would buy this house.

quickQuiz.hindi: अगर मैंने मेहनत की होती, तो मैं पास हो जाता।
quickQuiz.answer: If I had worked hard, I would have passed.

mustRememberRules: Reported speech backshifts tense; question tags use opposite polarity
Comparatives/superlatives change form based on adjective length
Articles depend on specificity and sound; conditionals depend on real vs unreal situations
'Since' + starting point, 'for' + duration; 'wish/if only' express regret
